method: Outside-in crawl (browser UA, robots-respecting — nyc.gov robots.txt only disallows /html/misc/). Fingerprinted www.nyc.gov/site/buildings (citywide NYC.gov CMS behind nginx + Akamai, Dynatrace/mPulse RUM). Probed the aNNN-*.nyc.gov application layer: a810-dobnow.nyc.gov (DOB NOW) and a810-bisweb.nyc.gov (BIS Web) both Akamai 'Access Denied' to non-browser clients; a810-efiling.nyc.gov is Apache Tomcat/9.0.117 (Java). Verified the exact Socrata agency label 'Department of Buildings (DOB)' and pulled all 44 DOB datasets from the NYC Open Data catalog API, plus column schemas of the top datasets.
headline_findings: The real legacy surface is the APPLICATION LAYER, not the website. www.nyc.gov/site/buildings is brochureware; the transactional systems of record are the aNNN-*.nyc.gov apps — BIS Web (a810-bisweb, legacy Building Information System), DOB NOW (a810-dobnow, the filing/permitting portal), and eFiling (a810-efiling, Apache Tomcat/Java).
None of the app-layer systems exposes a public API. BIS Web and DOB NOW are browser-only and Akamai-gated (Access Denied to non-browser clients).
The ONLY machine-readable output is a nightly Socrata BATCH DUMP. Every DOB dataset carries a 'DOBRunDate' column proving it is a one-way nightly extract, not a live interface.

44 DOB Open Data datasets, led by hugely popular ones: DOB Job Application Filings (ic3t-wcy2, 2.4M views, 95 cols), DOB Permit Issuance (ipu4-2q9a, 604k), DOB NOW Approved Permits (rbx6-tga4, 273k), DOB Complaints (eabe-havv), DOB Violations (3h2n-5cm9), DOB ECB Violations (6bgk-3dad), DOB Certificate of Occupancy (bs8b-p36w).

The domain is data-rich but transaction-closed: you can read yesterday's filings/permits/violations, but you cannot file, pay, or check status of a DOB NOW permit application via any API — that is the net-new write surface.
See tech-stack.md and apis-observed.md for the platform + app-layer inventory.

apis_observed.note: 44 DOB datasets; nightly BATCH extract of BIS/DOB NOW (DOBRunDate column). The only machine-readable DOB surface — read-only, lossy, a day stale.
The modern transactional system for filings, permits, C of O, elevator/boiler/facade safety. No public API; 403 'Access Denied' to non-browser clients.
Legacy Building Information System — the pre-DOB NOW system of record for jobs, permits, violations, complaints. Browser-only.
Apache Tomcat/9.0.117 (Java) — DOB eFiling. No API.
Brochureware on the citywide NYC.gov CMS (nginx + Akamai edge; Dynatrace + mPulse RUM). Links out to the app layer; holds no records.
Google Website Translator on the CMS.
City Record Online and NYC notification apps referenced from the DOB pages — same aNNN legacy-app pattern.

fruit.name: DOB Job Application Filings
opendata_match: DOB Job Application Filings ic3t-wcy2 (95c, 2.4M views)
DOB NOW: Build – Job Application Filings w9ak-ipjd (95c)
fruit.notes: The project's single most-viewed agency dataset. Source system is BIS/DOB NOW; Open Data is a nightly dump. No live filing API.

fruit.name: DOB Permit Issuance
opendata_match: DOB NOW: Build – Approved Permits rbx6-tga4 (46c)
fruit.notes: Issued work permits. Split across legacy (BIS) and DOB NOW extracts.

fruit.name: DOB Violations
fruit.notes: BIS-side violations; link to ECB via ECB_NUMBER.

fruit.name: DOB ECB Violations
fruit.notes: ECB/OATH adjudication record with penalties, hearings, certification status.

fruit.name: DOB Complaints Received
fruit.notes: 311-sourced building complaints, keyed by BIN; disposition codes.

fruit.name: DOB Certificate Of Occupancy
opendata_match: DOB NOW: Certificate of Occupancy pkdm-hqz6 (24c)
fruit.notes: Legal use/occupancy of a building; Final vs Temporary.

fruit.name: Property Data (Buildings Information System)
fruit.notes: BIN-keyed building/permit property view — the join spine. Underlying record is BIS Web (browser-only).

fruit.name: DOB NOW filing / permitting portal
fruit.notes: The write side — filing a job/permit application. Browser-only, Akamai-gated, no API. THE net-new transactional surface for this domain.

fruit.name: BIS Web (Building Information System)
fruit.notes: Legacy per-building lookup (jobs/permits/violations/complaints). Browser-only; its data reaches the public only via the nightly Socrata dump.

fruit.name: DOB License Info (licensed trades)
fruit.notes: Licensed contractors/professionals — the party layer on filings/permits.

fruit.name: DOB NOW Safety (Facades / Boiler / Elevator)
opendata_match: DOB NOW: Safety – Facades Compliance Filings xubg-57si (40c)
DOB NOW: Build Elevator Permit Applications kfp4-dz4h (82c)
fruit.notes: Periodic-inspection safety filings — all DOB NOW, all read-only extracts.
